- endpoint=EP15-007
- incident=IR15-007
- commander_approval=CA15-007

- no remaining mismatch outside the listed field set

B15-07-SRC-05: Policy POL15-007 requires exact match across endpoint, incident, commander_approval, scope, rollback_owner; if any field differs, the action boundary remains open; nearby records do not substitute.

- incident=IR15-007 ✓
- commander_approval=CA15-007 ✓
- scope=all endpoints in subnet ✓
- rollback_owner=RO15-007 ✓

All required fields match across the request, scoped authority, and binding ledger. The policy requirement for exact match is satisfied. CLS15-007 review note closure is noted. - boundary statement
